name: MenuEntryResponse
description: Class used to map menu entry information about a menu entry

type.name: type
type.description: Menu Entry type. Values: FOLDER, MENU_PAGE or EXTERNAL_PAGE

url.name: url
url.description: Menu Entry url, present if menu entry type is MENU_PAGE or EXTERNAL_PAGE

target.name: target
target.description: Menu Entry target, present if menu entry type is MENU_PAGE or EXTERNAL_PAGE

folderRef.name: folderRef
folderRef.description: Class that brings parent folder information

userPermissions.name: userPermissions
userPermissions.description: List of the user permissions information
